case_title: WAHL, ROBERTA DBA PLUM ARCHITECTS VS REAL PROPERTY SERVICES

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT REAL PROPERTY SERVICES HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2007 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REAL PROPERTY SERVICES
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY REAL PROPERTY SERVICES SET FOR NOV-14-2007 IS CONTINUED TO FEB-06-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. F. RAYRAY, CLERK; COMM PAUL SLAVIT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WAHL, ROBERTA DBA PLUM ARCHITECTS AS TO DEFENDANT REAL PROPERTY SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAHL, ROBERTA DBA PLUM ARCHITECTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REAL PROPERTY SERVICES $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,615.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY REAL PROPERTY SERVICES SET FOR FEB-06-2008 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-14-2008 AT 1:30 PM IN 506. IF NO APPEARANCES COURT WILL GRANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, AND DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY REAL PROPERTY SERVICES IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO ORDER OF FEBRUARY 6, 2008. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
